creator: michipili@gmail.com
text:
Is this the same problem as #199884?  Does this match the following upstream bug:

  http://caml.inria.fr/mantis/view.php?id=6628

If so, maybe you can ask for the bug to be reopened?


Can you provide more information on your setup (architecture and compilation options).
If your bug matches #199884 we should continue disccussion there, otherwise could you
file another bug?  Thanks!
